title: Parkio Daily: April 29, 2026
teaser: Magic Kingdom rededicates reimagined Wish Lounge. Disney VoluntEARS assemble 10,000 kits for Make-A-Wish families nationwide.

bignews.title: Magic Kingdom rededicates reimagined Wish Lounge for Make-A-Wish families
bignews.body: Walt Disney World rededicated the newly reimagined Wish Lounge at Magic Kingdom on April 27, a special space reserved exclusively for Make-A-Wish families to rest and recharge. Six-year-old wish kid Paxton joined Disney Experiences Chairman Thomas Mazloum, Walt Disney World President Jeff Vahle, and former wish kid-turned-cast member Abigail for the celebration. The refreshed lounge features new artwork and design details inspired by wish-granting moments from Disney stories, offering families a quiet retreat during their visit. Walt Disney World grants over 7,000 wishes annually.

bignews.title: Disney VoluntEARS assemble 10,000 wish kits during Week of Wishes
bignews.body: Disney VoluntEARS across the U.S. are assembling more than 10,000 wish kits this week for Make-A-Wish families. Around 100 Florida-based cast members packed 2,500 kits on April 28, following a kickoff event at Walt Disney Studios in Burbank. Each kit includes wish trip travel essentials like luggage tags and memory books, marking a special moment for families as they learn their wishes are about to come true. The nationwide initiative spans from California and Hawaii to New York. Since the first official wish was granted at Disneyland 45 years ago, Disney has worked with Make-A-Wish to grant more than 175,000 wishes worldwide.

topstories.title: New menu items debut at Yak & Yeti in Animal Kingdom
topstories.body: Yak & Yeti Restaurant at Disney's Animal Kingdom has introduced new menu offerings. The Asian-fusion dining location continues to serve guests with updated selections alongside its signature dishes.

topstories.title: Star Wars Nite after-hours event returns to Disneyland
topstories.body: Disneyland hosted its Star Wars Nite after-dark event on April 28. The special ticketed event offers Star Wars-themed entertainment, character encounters, and exclusive experiences after regular park hours.

icymi.title: Disney grants one wish every hour of every day
icymi.body: During Disney Week of Wishes, Disney celebrates its ongoing partnership with Make-A-Wish, granting a Disney wish every hour of every day. The week-long celebration features wish-granting moments across Disney Experiences worldwide, honoring children facing critical illnesses and the life-changing impact of their wishes.

spotlight.title: Former wish kid now creates magic for others as Disney cast member
spotlight.body: Abigail, whose own Make-A-Wish trip brought her to Walt Disney World over a decade ago, now works as part of the entertainment team helping kids and their families meet their favorite characters. She first visited the Wish Lounge during her own wish and experienced firsthand the lasting impact a Disney wish can have. Today, she helps create that same magic for other families, representing the over 7,000 wishes granted at the resort each year. Her journey from wish kid to wish-granter represents the enduring power of Disney's 45-year partnership with Make-A-Wish.
spotlight.ctaLabel: Read more about Disney Week of Wishes
